description_long: This stuffed toy resembles a small humanoid figure crafted to look like it is made from brown knitted yarn, with visible stitching details along the seams of its head and limbs. The head is large and rounded, featuring two prominent black button-like eyes and a subtle stitched mouth, giving it a simple, endearing expression. The body is proportionally smaller, with short arms and legs, and the hands and feet are rounded. A black collar or neckband is present, with a silver zipper detail running down the front of the torso, adding a playful, crafted touch. The surface texture is highly detailed, mimicking the look of woven fabric, and the toy appears soft and squeezable. This character is reminiscent of Sackboy from the LittleBigPlanet video game series, making it recognizable and appealing in urban play areas or as a collectible.
description: A brown, yarn-textured humanoid stuffed toy with button-like eyes, visible stitching, and a zipper detail on its chest. The toy has a soft, crafted appearance and a friendly, simple expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, rounded head with black button eyes, stitched mouth, and a zipper detail on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the head's stitching, the profile of the button eye, and the arm and leg shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with visible seam lines and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side stitching, button eye, and limb contours.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large black button eyes and a simple stitched mouth. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides and legs apart, giving a balanced and approachable stance.
